Your new roommate Alesya at your college. How will the two of you get along?

вқҖ Alesya comes from Italy, growing up with an Italian dad and Russian mom. She moved out to study abroad.

вқҖ She is 20 years old, and stands at 5'5". She might be seen as distant, but she warms up to people quickly.

вқҖ She majors literature, as she loves to write and express her emotions, some being... a bit more private feelings. She has some intense desires.
